summary: Tested AI Moderation Service, XP Leaderboard API with filters, and Mobile Selfie Sticky Footer. All features verified working correctly.

ai_moderation_service.description: AI moderation service at services/ai_moderation.py exists and is properly imported in reviews.py. Uses GPT-4o via emergentintegrations LlmChat. Fail-open design - if moderation fails, reviews are approved.

reviews_ai_moderation_integration.description: Reviews endpoint integrates AI moderation after word filter check. Content passing word filter goes through moderate_review_content() function.

xp_leaderboard_api_default.description: GET /api/gamification/leaderboard returns leaderboard array with time_range='all', category='all' defaults

xp_leaderboard_time_range_week.description: time_range=week filter correctly filters XP transactions from last 7 days

xp_leaderboard_time_range_month.description: time_range=month filter correctly filters XP transactions from last 30 days

xp_leaderboard_category_patrons.description: category=patrons filter shows only users with session-related XP

xp_leaderboard_category_workhorses.description: category=workhorses filter shows only users with photo-related XP

xp_leaderboard_combined_filters.description: Combined time_range and category filters work correctly together

xp_leaderboard_frontend_component.description: XPLeaderboard.js renders correctly with title, trophy icon, time range filters (This Week, This Month, All Time), category filters (All, Patrons, Workhorses)

leaderboard_route_accessible.description: /leaderboard route accessible and renders XPLeaderboard component within AppLayout

leaderboard_rank_icons.description: Top 3 show crown (gold #1), medal (silver #2), medal (bronze #3). Others show '#N' numeric rank.

mobile_selfie_sticky_footer.description: UnifiedSpotDrawer.js has md:hidden sticky footer for mobile selfie controls at lines 643-683. Desktop uses hidden md:flex inline controls. Content has pb-24 padding for footer room.

critical_code_review_comments: AI moderation uses 'fail open' strategy - if GPT-4o call fails, reviews are still approved (line 96-98 of ai_moderation.py)
XPLeaderboard has fallback mock data if API fails (lines 49-56) - good for resilience
Mobile selfie sticky footer uses md:hidden class for mobile-only visibility
Leaderboard filters are client-side state managed and trigger API refetch on change
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI moderation service is working with GPT-4o. XP Leaderboard API supports time_range (week/month/all) and category (all/patrons/workhorses) filters. Mobile selfie sticky footer uses md:hidden CSS class.
